TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_banday
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau taytaanku a a siasin tangi nani.
S.PHON: jau tajtaanku a a siasin taŋi nani.
S.FORM: yau taytaanku a a siasin tangi nani.
S.PHON: jau tajtaanku a a siasin taŋi nani.
jau usiq a βaqian.
jau usiq a βaqian.

S.FORM: zaqis tu paRin ta muluan qimulu.
S.PHON: z~raqis tu paʁin ta muruan qimuru.
S.FORM: zaqis tu paRin ta muluan qimulu.
S.PHON: z~raqis tu paʁin ta muruan qimuru.

TRANSL.notes: (He) climbed up the tree to pluck oranges.

S.TRANSL: climbed up the tree to pluck oranges.

S.PHON: * uturu a jau a.
* uturu a jau a.
**** niaraanna ta tu muru.
**** niaraanna ta tu muru.
taz~rian ta raŋaan.
taz~rian ta raŋaan.
mawtu a sunisna mraras tmanan.
mawtu a sunisna mraras tmanan.
S.TRANSL: His child came back, chewing betel nuts.

S.PHON: satuʁin a sunis ʔnaj.
satuʁin a sunis ʔnaj.
araanna ja sapiʁin.
araanna ja sapiʁin.
ja muru ʔnaj nani.
ja muru ʔnaj nani.
paz~raqisanna taz~rian taqajtunan.
paz~raqisanna taz~rian taqajtunan.
sukaw raz~ran saiz~ri ʔnaj nani.
sukaw raz~ran saiz~ri ʔnaj nani.

S.FORM: yau usiq a tazungan siqaytun nani simqaRiway.
S.PHON: jau usiq a taz~ruŋan siqajtun nani simqaʁiwaj.
S.FORM: yau usiq a tazungan siqaytun nani simqaRiway.
S.PHON: jau usiq a taz~ruŋan siqajtun nani simqaʁiwaj.

TRANSL.notes: 有個女孩騎車,然後(跟他)相撞.

S.TRANSL: 有個女孩騎車,然後 相撞.

TRANSL.notes: There was a girl riding a bicycle and then collided with (the child).

S.TRANSL: There was a girl riding a bicycle and then collided with .

S.PHON: sukaw raz~ran msuʁawti a sunis ʔnaj.
sukaw raz~ran msuʁawti a sunis ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: 路不好,(所以)小孩跌倒了.

S.TRANSL: 路不好, 小孩跌倒了.

TRANSL.notes: The road was uneven, (so) the child fell.

S.TRANSL: The road was uneven, the child fell.

S.PHON: tu tmiβuqti a muru ʔnaj taməranajan.
tu tmiβuqti a muru ʔnaj taməranajan.
S.TRANSL: The oranges fell onto the ground.

S.FORM: tawian tangayauanna nani yau a m kinspat a sunis a mawRat.
S.PHON: tawian taŋajauanna nani jau a m kinspat a sunis a mawʁat.
S.FORM: tawian tangayauanna nani yau a m kinspat a sunis a mawRat.
S.PHON: tawian taŋajauanna nani jau a m kinspat a sunis a mawʁat.
S.TRANSL: 前面那邊有四個小孩在玩.
In the front there, there were four children playing around.

S.FORM: taytaanna tu msuRaw qaqaytunay sunis tu.
S.PHON: tajtaanna tu msuʁaw qaqajtunaj sunis tu.
S.FORM: taytaanna tu msuRaw qaqaytunay sunis tu.
S.PHON: tajtaanna tu msuʁaw qaqajtunaj sunis tu.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到那個騎腳踏車的小孩跌倒.

TRANSL.notes: (They) saw that the child who rode a bike fell.

S.TRANSL: saw that the child who rode a bike fell.

S.FORM: ngid tungaw tu mulu talepawanna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮ tuŋaw tu muru tarəpawanna nani.
S.FORM: ngid tungaw tu mulu talepawanna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮ tuŋaw tu muru tarəpawanna nani.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) wanted to send those oranges to his home.

S.TRANSL: wanted to send those oranges to his home.

S.PHON: qatiwan paŋmuanna kmjara.
qatiwan paŋmuanna kmjara.

S.FORM: pangmuanna pizi taqaytunan ya mulu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuanna piz~ri taqajtunan ja muru ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: pangmuanna pizi taqaytunan ya mulu 'nay nani.
S.PHON: paŋmuanna piz~ri taqajtunan ja muru ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙把橘子放回車上.
They helped put those oranges onto the car.

S.PHON: paz~raqisannati uman sunis ʔnaj mtaŋan.
paz~raqisannati uman sunis ʔnaj mtaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 他們再扶那個小孩上車.
They lifted the child onto the bike again.

W.TRANSL: 使役-上去-處焦-3PL.屬格=完成

S.FORM: patuRuzanna sunis ma sunisna mawRatay tu halo zinna qmeRas nani.
S.PHON: patuʁuz~ranna sunis ma sunisna mawʁataj tu har* z~rinna qməʁas nani.
S.FORM: patuRuzanna sunis ma sunisna mawRatay tu halo zinna qmeRas nani.
S.PHON: patuʁuz~ranna sunis ma sunisna mawʁataj tu har* z~rinna qməʁas nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們背著那個玩耍的小孩,大聲地說哈囉.
They carried the child who was playing and said 'hello' loudly.

S.PHON: qatiwanna uman nani sunis ʔnaj nani.
qatiwanna uman nani sunis ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: He went to those children again.

S.PHON: βuraanna tu uz~rusa ja muru.
βuraanna tu uz~rusa ja muru.

S.FORM: nani 'nay sayi nani nanzuzusaannati qman tu mulu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani ʔnaj saji nani nanz~ruz~rusaannati qman tu muru ʔnaj.
S.FORM: nani 'nay sayi nani nanzuzusaannati qman tu mulu 'nay.
S.PHON: nani ʔnaj saji nani nanz~ruz~rusaannati qman tu muru ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 他們可以分半吃那些橘子.
They could share the oranges with one another.

S.PHON: najau a tənajtaanku tu taŋi ʔnaj.
najau a tənajtaanku tu taŋi ʔnaj.
